args: : "${CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT:?telegram-topics must be loaded via the plugin system (set --dangerously-load-development-channels plugin:telegram-topics@wilfoa-plugins) — do not invoke this .mcp.json directly}" && (cd "$CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT" && bun install --no-summary) >&2 && exec bun "$CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT/shim.ts"
